name: whale
description: Control NAVER Whale from Codex, with Chromium-compatible browser automation and Whale-specific extension API guidance.

interface.longDescription: Whale lets Codex connect to a NAVER Whale browser started with remote debugging, inspect tabs, navigate, read DOM text, run Chromium DevTools Protocol commands, capture screenshots, and exercise Whale-specific browser surfaces such as sidebar, space, mobile window, and web-app link targets. It also includes a Whale extension API map and a sidebar extension sample based on NAVER Whale developer documentation.
defaultPrompt: Open Whale and inspect the current tab
Test this site in NAVER Whale
